.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(217, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--base-font-face:
system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Helvetica Neue", Arial,
    "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Hiragino Sans", "メイリオ", Meiryo, sans-serif
body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #eaeaea 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#eaeaea, color-mix(in srgb, #eaeaea 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #eaeaea 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#eaeaea, color-mix(in srgb, #eaeaea 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(217, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(217, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(217, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].background: rgb(224, 109, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h2[data-heading=\"This is a heading 2\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].background: rgb(240, 80, 6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h3[data-heading=\"This is a heading 3\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].background: rgb(240, 80, 6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h4[data-heading=\"This is a heading 4\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].background: rgb(240, 80, 6) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h5[data-heading=\"This is a heading 5\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
h6[data-heading=\"This is a heading 6\"].font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

hr.background: rgb(217, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

hr.workspace-leaf-resize-handle.background: rgb(217, 217, 217) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

html.--base-font-face:
system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "Helvetica Neue", Arial,
    "Hiragino Kaku Gothic ProN", "Hiragino Sans", "メイリオ", Meiryo, sans-serif

input[type=\"checkbox\"].font-family: "??", "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(224, 109, 15) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(234, 234, 234) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

mark.background: rgb(233, 179, 95) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(228, 227, 224) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
pre.font-family: "??", "??", ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace
